applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: canonical torch equivalent (no registered golden_src; no unit tests available — pattern derived from op semantics, single-op chain); constraints: {'start_alignment': 'call sites tile-align start: start = (token_id // ttnn.TILE_SIZE) * ttnn.TILE_SIZE when narrowing along a tiled dim', 'length_alignment': 'length is TILE_SIZE-aligned when slicing tiled dims (dim=1 call site uses length=ttnn.TILE_SIZE); dim=0 (non-tile) slices use length=1'}; fusion_notes: Pure slice op; fuses as a chain element. Observed fused upstream of LM-head matmul (slice-before-matmul to reduce matmul work to a single tile row) and as zero-copy view extraction per-expert in MoE loops (dispatched_buffer / expert_outputs along dim=0). Also used to produce an 'out=' view target, i.e. narrow can appear on both input and output sides of a fused FFN.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activations (1, seq_len, emb_dim); narrowed on dim=1 to length=TILE_SIZE before LM-head matmul
placement_observations.source: TtLMHead.forward call site (logits single-token slice, tile_start = (local_token_id // TILE_SIZE) * TILE_SIZE)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: dispatched_buffer (experts_per_chip, max_tokens, emb_dim); narrowed on dim=0 to length=1 per expert
placement_observations.source: MoE expert loop call site (per-expert token extraction)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: expert_outputs (experts_per_chip, max_tokens, emb_dim); narrow used to create out= write-view of length=1 on dim=0
placement_observations.source: MoE expert loop call site (out=ttnn.narrow(expert_outputs, dim=0, start=local_expert, length=1) passed to _expert_ffn)
